## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX to discuss content performance, strategy, and production updates.](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog sessions increased for the second consecutive week, with AI expense management page performing well](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Per diem pages saw a slight drop in sessions, partly due to new .gov domains appearing in search results](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Vendor "versus" pages are outperforming alternatives pages; team considering industry-specific AI tool content](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Publishing automation for overview pages hit some snags but progress is being made](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Overview

  - [Blog: Second consecutive week of increased sessions](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
      - [AI expense management page received high traffic](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
      - [Other top performers: cash budget, late fees on invoices, six forecasts, IRS receipt requirements](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Per diem pages:](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
      - [Slight drop in overall sessions over past 3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
      - [New York, DC, Oregon, Florida lost the most traffic](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
      - [New .gov domains appearing in search results (e.g., defense travel management office, Florida ports)](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
      - [AI overviews now appearing mid-page instead of top](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Expense category pages: No major changes](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Tuning pages: Assets and liabilities performed best](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Treasury pages: Drop due to liquidity position report losing clicks](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Vendor pages:](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
      - ["Versus" pages performing best since June 30th](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
      - [Shopify and Figma overview pages in top 20](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
      - [Alternatives pages not attracting much traffic](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)

### Content Strategy Discussion

  - [Team considering capturing traffic from pricing and other keywords](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Exploring industry-specific AI tool content (e.g., "best AI tools for marketing agencies")](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Debate on creating new pages vs. enriching existing overview pages with industry-specific information](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Challenge: Lack of proprietary metrics/benchmarks for industry-specific model comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)

### Content Refresh Performance

  - [4-5 URLs separated from existing blog pages](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [July 7th publications (procurement challenges, e-invoicing) showing improved performance (20 and 12 sessions)](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
  - [Other refreshed content showing slight improvement, needs more time to evaluate](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)

### Production Updates

  - [Awaiting feedback on latest vendor pages and content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [Datadog overview page: Questions about cost relative to category](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Victoria to create data wrapper charts for three new categories by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)

### Publishing Automation Progress

  - [Hit snags with automation for overview pages due to complexity](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)
  - [Issues with data saving and backend presentation](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Testing publishing into Sanity instance with test vendor](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Update expected next week](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)

### Technical Updates

  - [New method for creating tables using markdown in the workflow coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
  - [Will address current table and chart creation limitations](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Victoria to submit updates for Datadog overview page and similar issues](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Victoria to create data wrapper charts for new categories by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [GrowthX to research and present ways to expand/dive deeper into industry-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide update on publishing automation progress next week](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [Luke to keep team updated on new markdown-based table creation method](https://fathom.video/share/G8Zurju6HFRBs5TVYE7YyxfYzNgewmFR?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
